lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਭੈ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪ੍ਰੇਮੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਬਿਨੁ ਭੈ ਪਾਰਿ ਨ ਉਤਰਿਆ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: bin bhai kinai na prem paaeaa bin bhai paar na utariaa koee |
lines.english: Without the Fear of God, His Love is not obtained. Without the Fear of God, no one is carried across to the other side.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਉ ਭਾਉ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਲਾਗੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਤੂ ਆਪਣੀ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: bhau bhaau preet naanak tiseh laagai jis too aapanee kirapaa kareh |
lines.english: O Nanak, he alone is blessed with the Fear of God, and God's Love and Affection, whom You, Lord, bless with Your Mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਭੰਡਾਰ ਅਸੰਖ ਜਿਸੁ ਤੂ ਦੇਵਹਿ ਮੇਰੇ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਿਲਹਿ ॥੪॥੩॥
lines.translit: teree bhagat bhanddaar asankh jis too deveh mere suaamee tis mileh |4|3|
lines.english: The treasures of devotional worship to You are countless; he alone is blessed with Them, O my Lord and Master, whom You bless. ||4||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਵਣੁ ਪੁਰਬੁ ਅਭੀਚੁ ਗੁਰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਦਰਸੁ ਭਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naavan purab abheech gur satigur daras bheaa |
lines.english: To receive the Blessed Vision of the Darshan of the Guru, the True Guru, is to truly bathe at the Abhaijit festival.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਖਾਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: tukhaaree mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Tukhaari, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਮੈਲੁ ਹਰੀ ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਅੰਧੇਰੁ ਗਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: duramat mail haree agiaan andher geaa |
lines.english: The filth of evil-mindedness is washed off, and the darkness of ignorance is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਦਰਸੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: gur daras paaeaa agiaan gavaaeaa antar jot pragaasee |
lines.english: Blessed by the Guru's Darshan, spiritual ignorance is dispelled, and the Divine Light illuminates the inner being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਦੁਖ ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: janam maran dukh khin meh binase har paaeaa prabh abinaasee |
lines.english: The pains of birth and death vanish in an instant, and the Eternal, Imperishable Lord God is found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਕਰਤੈ ਪੁਰਬੁ ਕੀਆ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਕੁਲਖੇਤਿ ਨਾਵਣਿ ਗਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: har aap karatai purab keea satiguroo kulakhet naavan geaa |
lines.english: The Creator Lord God Himself created the festival, when the True Guru went to bathe at the festival in Kuruk-shaytra.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਵਣੁ ਪੁਰਬੁ ਅਭੀਚੁ ਗੁਰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਦਰਸੁ ਭਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naavan purab abheech gur satigur daras bheaa |1|
lines.english: To receive the Blessed Vision of the Darshan of the Guru, the True Guru, is to truly bathe at the Abhaijit festival. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਬਣੀ ਖਿਨੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਨਿਮਖ ਵਿਖਾ ॥
lines.translit: anadin bhagat banee khin khin nimakh vikhaa |
lines.english: Night and day, devotional worship services were held, each and every instant, with each step.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰਗਿ ਪੰਥਿ ਚਲੇ ਗੁਰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਿਖਾ ॥
lines.translit: maarag panth chale gur satigur sang sikhaa |
lines.english: The Sikhs travelled with the Guru, the True Guru, on the path, along the road.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਦਰਸੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਗੁਰੂ ਕੀਆ ਤਿਨ ਆਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਮੇਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jin daras satigur guroo keea tin aap har melaaeaa |
lines.english: Whoever was blessed with the Darshan of the Guru, the True Guru, the Lord united with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਬਣੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੇਰੀ ਸਭੁ ਲੋਕੁ ਵੇਖਣਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: har har bhagat banee prabh keree sabh lok vekhan aaeaa |
lines.english: Devotional worship services to the Lord God were held, and all the people came to see the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਰਥ ਉਦਮੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਕੀਆ ਸਭ ਲੋਕ ਉਧਰਣ ਅਰਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: teerath udam satiguroo keea sabh lok udharan arathaa |
lines.english: The True Guru made the pilgrimage to the sacred shrines, for the sake of saving all the people.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰਗਿ ਪੰਥਿ ਚਲੇ ਗੁਰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਿਖਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: maarag panth chale gur satigur sang sikhaa |2|
lines.english: The Sikhs travelled with the Guru, the True Guru, on the path, along the road. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਥਮ ਆਏ ਕੁਲਖੇਤਿ ਗੁਰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪੁਰਬੁ ਹੋਆ ॥
lines.translit: pratham aae kulakhet gur satigur purab hoaa |
lines.english: When the Guru, the True Guru, first arrived at Kuruk-shaytra, it was a very auspicious time.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਖਣਿ ਆਏ ਤੀਨਿ ਲੋਕ ਸੁਰਿ ਨਰ ਮੁਨਿ ਜਨ ਸਭਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: dekhan aae teen lok sur nar mun jan sabh aaeaa |
lines.english: The angelic beings and silent sages from all the three worlds came to see Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਪਰਸਿਆ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਪੂਰਾ ਤਿਨ ਕੇ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਨਾਸ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jin parasiaa gur satiguroo pooraa tin ke kilavikh naas gavaaeaa |
lines.english: Those who are touched by the Guru, the True Guru - all their sins and mistakes were erased and dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਬਰਿ ਭਈ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ਆਏ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਲੋਆ ॥
lines.translit: khabar bhee sansaar aae trai loaa |
lines.english: The news spread throughout the world, and the beings of the three worlds came.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗੀ ਦਿਗੰਬਰ ਸੰਨਿਆਸੀ ਖਟੁ ਦਰਸਨ ਕਰਿ ਗਏ ਗੋਸਟਿ ਢੋਆ ॥
lines.translit: jogee diganbar saniaasee khatt darasan kar ge gosatt dtoaa |
lines.english: The Yogis, the nudists, the Sannyaasees and those of the six schools of philosophy spoke with Him, and then bowed and departed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਤੀਆ ਜਮੁਨ ਗਏ ਗੁਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਨੁ ਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: duteea jamun ge gur har har japan keea |
lines.english: Second, the Guru went to the river Jamunaa, where He chanted the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਥਮ ਆਏ ਕੁਲਖੇਤਿ ਗੁਰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪੁਰਬੁ ਹੋਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: pratham aae kulakhet gur satigur purab hoaa |3|
lines.english: When the Guru, the True Guru, first arrived at Kuruk-shaytra, it was a very auspicious time. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਛੁਟੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਪਿਛੈ ਜਿਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabh chhuttee satiguroo pichhai jin har har naam dhiaaeaa |
lines.english: All the True Guru's followers were excused from the tax; they meditated on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਗਾਤੀ ਮਿਲੇ ਦੇ ਭੇਟ ਗੁਰ ਪਿਛੈ ਲੰਘਾਇ ਦੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: jaagaatee mile de bhett gur pichhai langhaae deea |
lines.english: The tax collectors met the Guru and gave Him offerings; they did not impose the tax on His followers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨਿ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਜੋ ਪੰਥਿ ਚਾਲੇ ਤਿਨ ਜਮੁ ਜਾਗਾਤੀ ਨੇੜਿ ਨ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur bachan maarag jo panth chaale tin jam jaagaatee nerr na aaeaa |
lines.english: The Messenger of Death does not even approach those who have walked on the path, and followed the Guru's Teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੂ ਜਗਤੁ ਬੋਲੈ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਨਾਇ ਲਇਐ ਸਭਿ ਛੁਟਕਿ ਗਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabh guroo guroo jagat bolai gur kai naae leiai sabh chhuttak geaa |
lines.english: All the world said, "Guru! Guru! Guru!" Uttering the Guru's Name, they were all emancipated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਤੀਆ ਜਮੁਨ ਗਏ ਗੁਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਨੁ ਕੀਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: duteea jamun ge gur har har japan keea |4|
lines.english: Second, the Guru went to the river Jamunaa, where He chanted the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਤੀਆ ਆਏ ਸੁਰਸਰੀ ਤਹ ਕਉਤਕੁ ਚਲਤੁ ਭਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: triteea aae surasaree teh kautak chalat bheaa |
lines.english: Third, He went to the Ganges, and a wonderful drama was played out there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਢੁ ਦਾਮੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਪਇਆ ਨ ਬੋਲਕ ਜਾਗਾਤੀਆ ਮੋਹਣ ਮੁੰਦਣਿ ਪਈ ॥
lines.translit: aadt daam kichh peaa na bolak jaagaateea mohan mundan pee |
lines.english: No tax at all was collected, and the mouths of the tax collectors were sealed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਮੋਹੀ ਦੇਖਿ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਸੰਤ ਕਿਨੈ ਆਢੁ ਨ ਦਾਮੁ ਲਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabh mohee dekh darasan gur sant kinai aadt na daam leaa |
lines.english: All were fascinated, gazing upon the Blessed Vision of the Saintly Guru's Darshan; no tax at all was imposed upon anyone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਹਮ ਕਰਹ ਕਿਆ ਕਿਸੁ ਪਾਸਿ ਮਾਂਗਹ ਸਭ ਭਾਗਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪਿਛੈ ਪਈ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee ham karah kiaa kis paas maangah sabh bhaag satigur pichhai pee |
lines.english: They said, "O brothers, what should we do? Who should we ask? Everyone is running after the True Guru."
